idea-plugin.name: DotEnvify
idea-plugin.description:
Pull environment variables from Azure DevOps Variable Groups directly into your .env file — no CLI, no portal copy-paste.

Azure DevOps Integration

  • Fetch variables from Azure DevOps Variable Groups with one click
  • Secure OAuth sign-in (Device Code Flow) — no tokens in config files
  • Live preview with format options before writing
  • Smart merge when .env already exists — per-key conflict resolution
  • Organization URL saved globally, variable group saved per project

Convert & Format

  • Parse multiple input formats (KEY=VALUE, KEY VALUE, line pairs, quoted values)
  • Smart quoting for URLs and values with spaces
  • Optional export prefix, alphabetical sorting, filters
  • Incremental backups before overwriting
  • Drag-and-drop file support, clipboard paste

Diagnostics

  • Detect missing env keys (referenced in code but not in .env)
  • Detect unused keys (in .env but never referenced)
  • Click to navigate to source file — supports JS, Python, Go, Java, Kotlin, Ruby, PHP, Rust, C#, YAML
  • Auto-watch: re-run diagnostics when .env changes
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0

  • Initial release
  • Multi-format .env parser and formatter
  • Convert selection and file actions with live preview
  • Tool window with Convert, Azure DevOps, and Diagnostics tabs
  • Azure DevOps variable group fetch via Device Code OAuth
  • Multi-language env key diagnostics with clickable navigation
  • Merge preview with selective per-key conflict resolution
  • Global and per-project settings

action.description: Convert selected key-value text to .env format
Parse this file and convert to .env format
